Description:
Standard-issue Robotek personal sidearm. The RA-1 ("Robotek Arms, Series 1") fires a single charged round per pull and recharges between shots, producing the characteristic deliberate cadence familiar from anyone who has worked security in a Robotek facility. The weapon is ubiquitous: every facility's armory has them, every guard unit carries one, and the surplus market is saturated.

The RA-1's reputation is mixed. Defenders note that its reliability is exceptional and its maintenance requirements are nearly zero. Critics note that this is because nothing about it is impressive. A single shot will deter most light targets and inconvenience most heavy ones. It is a weapon that will not let you down, and will also not particularly help you.

Robotek Arms has produced the RA-1 with minor revisions for over forty years. Plans for a successor model have been announced four times and shelved four times.
